description: Private proposals that should not appear in public listings. On static hosting they work as unlisted links; for true privacy, migrate to a backend/serverless setup.
securityNote: Do not store sensitive documents or complete personal data in this public JSON. Use quoteCode + token only as a basic commercial access control.

packages.title: Package privado Machu Picchu and Amazonas para familia
packages.subtitle: Servicio privado para 2 adultos and 3 adolescentes, con bilingual guide and asistencia por WhatsApp.

client.notes: Anglo-American family. They speak Spanish and English. They request private services only.

pricing.flightsNote: Domestic flights Cusco - Puerto Maldonado and Puerto Maldonado - Lima/Cusco are not included; they are quoted according to date and availability.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Cusco
items: Private reception at Cusco airport.
Private transfer to the hotel.
Acclimatization time and briefing by WhatsApp or in person.

itinerary.title: Private Sacred Valley and train to Machu Picchu Pueblo
items: Pickup privado en hotel.
Suggested route: Chinchero, Maras, Moray and Ollantaytambo according to schedules.
Private Spanish/English bilingual guide.
Tourist train to Machu Picchu Pueblo.

itinerary.title: Private Machu Picchu and return to Cusco
items: Bus Consettur ida and vuelta.
Machu Picchu entrance according to availability.
Private bilingual guide.
Return train and private transfer to your hotel in Cusco.

itinerary.title: Flight to Puerto Maldonado and transfer to the lodge
items: Private transfer from Cusco hotel to airport.
Cusco - Puerto Maldonado flight not included in the base rate.
Reception in Puerto Maldonado and transfer to the lodge.
Lunch/dinner and Amazon activity according to program.

itinerary.title: Amazon experience in Tambopata
items: Interpretive hike or nature activity.
Flora and fauna observation.
Meals included according to the lodge program.
Night activity subject to operation and weather.

itinerary.title: Return from Puerto Maldonado
items: Breakfast.
Transfer to Puerto Maldonado airport.
Departure flight not included in the base rate.

includes: Private services in Cusco, the Sacred Valley and Machu Picchu.
Private Spanish/English bilingual guide in Cusco and Machu Picchu.
Private transfers indicated in the itinerary.
Standard tourist train Ollantaytambo - Machu Picchu Pueblo - Ollantaytambo.
Machu Picchu entrance subject to availability.
Accommodation according to the customer’s selection.
Amazon lodge program according to selection.
excludes: Lunches and dinners not mentioned outside the lodge.
Train or room upgrade not selected.
notes: Reference quote subject to ticket, train, hotel/lodge and flight availability.
